parsed.content: Thank you for considering Grand Meridian Ballroom Catering for your June wedding! I'm delighted to provide our elegant plated dinner service for 120 guests, featuring our signature Italian and Mediterranean cuisine with seamless coordination with the venue team.

parsed.content: Wonderful! I'm thrilled you're happy with our plated dinner package. For your premium bar experience, I recommend our Open Premium package at $65 per head, featuring top-shelf spirits, craft cocktails, and premium wines that perfectly complement our Italian-Mediterranean cuisine.
